_meta.probe: POST /v1/chat/completions, prompt='merge_intervals coding task', max_tokens=256, temp=0.3 (after warmup)
constraints_24gb: preset MEM=0.85 leaves no draft headroom on 24GB; use --mem-fraction-static 0.70 for spec configs

EAGLE3: R9700's full ladder (topk 16 / draft 32) OOMs the draft cuda graphs on 24GB. Conservative ladder (steps 3/topk 1/draft 4) fits with margin; wider ladder (steps 4/topk 4/draft 8) gives more speedup and still fits.

DFlash on Qwen3_5MoeForConditionalGeneration: requires SGLANG_ENABLE_SPEC_V2=1 + --mamba-scheduler-strategy extra_buffer (else rejects at boot); also requires target --dtype bfloat16 to match the BF16 draft (else 'Index put dtype mismatch' at scheduler exception); context capped at 32K to fit target+draft on 24GB.

dflash_bf16.coherent_note: probe expects coding keywords; qwen36 is a thinking-mode model and routes content to reasoning_content. Decode throughput is real; same coherent=False as the no-spec baseline at the same context.

headline: EAGLE3 + DFlash work on our AWQ; DFlash@qwen36 = 4.1× (30.6 -> 126.3 tok/s), EAGLE3@coder-30b = 1.65× (185.5 -> 306.0 tok/s). R9700's full EAGLE3 ladder doesn't fit 24GB; ours captures most of the win at narrower settings.
